title: epipactis × subtilis
intro: Epipactis × subtilis, also known as the hybrid helleborine, is a natural hybrid plant that is a cross between Epipactis purpurata and Epipactis helleborine. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial compounds. The health benefits of Epipactis × subtilis are thought to include its ability to reduce inflammation, boost the immune system, and potentially aid in the treatment of various respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Epipactis × subtilis can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, although further research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential uses.
